title: スプリンターズSの後に・連覇！！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Successfully keeping Nishino Flower in check,
Sakura Bakushin O claims victory at the Sprinters
Stakes once again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having witnessed her win successively on the big
stage, I compliment her to no end!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If her skills are strong enough to win the Sprinters
Stakes two times in a row, she can surely try for
1,600 meters.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Convinced that the win is more than just a stroke
of luck, I decide to extend her usual distance by
sending her off for the Mile Championship!
